* /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup --db /data/mnemosyne.db --dest /backups\n\n# Weekly report (Mondays at 9 AM)\n0 9 * * 1 /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-report --db /data/mnemosyne.db --email 1b:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Script"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate\n\nimport argparse\nfrom mnemosyne import Memory\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  mem = Memory(db_path=args.db)\n  stats_before = mem.stats()\n\n  mem.sleep()  # Run consolidation\n\n  stats_after = mem.stats()\n  print(f\"Consolidated: {stats_after.consolidated_count - stats_before.consolidated_count}\")\n  print(f\"Evicted: {stats_after.evicted_count - stats_before.evicted_count}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Script"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup\n\nimport argparse\nimport shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  parser.add_argument(\"--dest\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\")\n  backup_name = f\"mnemosyne_{timestamp}.db\"\n  dest = Path(args.dest) / backup_name\n\n  shutil.copy2(args.db, dest)\n  print(f\"Backup created: {dest}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Monitoring Cron Jobs"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"# Add to crontab\nMAILTO=admin@example.com\n\n# Or log to file\n0 3 * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate --db /data/mnemosyne.db >> /var/log/mnemosyne/consolidate.log 2>&1\n","language":"bash"}]

Cron runs with a minimal PATH. Test scripts manually before adding to crontab."}]}]]}]]}]}]
